creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Greg Lewis from comment #10)

OK, I see now what you are saying. I would rather say that Java 18 is frozen and no need to change it. If someone really requires another cacerts, one can take my oneliner for this. It just works in our post-installation (PI) process.
Just keep it consistent with Java 17+ and move on. Java 19 doesn't have it anyway.
